ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the airport is located */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport's location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the airport */,
  "terminal_count" INTEGER /* Number of terminals */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the airport */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "airfare" (
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare record */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Code of the airport */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Airline carrier */,
  "fare" REAL /* Original fare amount */,
  "adj_fare" REAL /* Adjusted fare amount */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the fare was recorded */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month the fare was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source airport code */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination airport code */,
  "class" TEXT /* Fare class (e.g., Economy, Business, First) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the fare */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the route */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate used for adjusting the fare */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airfare_airport_code FOREIGN KEY ("airport_code") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Code of the airport */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the report was recorded */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month the report was recorded */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the period */,
  "total_expenses" REAL /* Total expenses for the period */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit for the period */,
  "operating_income" REAL /* Operating income */,
  "operating_expenses" REAL /* Operating expenses */,
  "non_operating_income" REAL /* Non-operating income */,
  "non_operating_expenses" REAL /* Non-operating expenses */,
  "taxes" REAL /* Taxes paid */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the financial report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_airport_code FOREIGN KEY ("airport_code") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight operation */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Code of the airport */,
  "flight_date" TEXT /* Date of the flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Airline carrier */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft used */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on the flight */,
  "cargo_weight" REAL /* Weight of cargo on the flight */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., On Time, Delayed, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_operations_aircraft_type FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_type") REFERENCES aircraft_types ("aircraft_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_operations_airport_code FOREIGN KEY ("airport_code") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource being accessed (e.g., airport, fare) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_types" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft type */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Passenger capacity of the aircraft */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed of the aircraft */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the aircraft */,
  "range" REAL /* Range of the aircraft */,
  "cruise_speed" REAL /* Cruise speed of the aircraft */,
  "fuel_capacity" REAL /* Fuel capacity of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_data" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the passenger */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the passenger */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number of the passenger's trip */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date of booking */,
  "travel_class" TEXT /* Travel class (e.g., Economy, Business, First) */,
  "ticket_price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cargo_data" (
  "cargo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cargo */,
  "cargo_number" TEXT /* Cargo number */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the cargo */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the cargo */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the cargo */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the cargo */,
  "cargo_type" TEXT /* Type of cargo (e.g., freight, mail) */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number of the cargo */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date of booking */,
  "cargo_value" REAL /* Value of the cargo */,
  "handling_fee" REAL /* Handling fee for the cargo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cargo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cargo_data_origin FOREIGN KEY ("origin") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cargo_data_destination FOREIGN KEY ("destination") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_information" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "source_airport_code" TEXT /* Code of the source airport */,
  "destination_airport_code" TEXT /* Code of the destination airport */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the source and destination airports */,
  "flight_time" TEXT /* Estimated flight time for the route */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of flights on the route */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Airline carrier */,
  "flight_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of flights (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "flight_class" TEXT /* Class of service (e.g., Economy, Business, First) */,
  "average_fare" REAL /* Average fare for the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_information_source_airport_code FOREIGN KEY ("source_airport_code") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_information_destination_airport_code FOREIGN KEY ("destination_airport_code") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Code of the airport */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature at the airport */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity at the airport */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed at the airport */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation at the airport */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "sunrise_time" TEXT /* Sunrise time */,
  "sunset_time" TEXT /* Sunset time */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_airport_code FOREIGN KEY ("airport_code") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotel_partners" (
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotel */,
  "hotel_name" TEXT /* Name of the hotel */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Code of the nearest airport */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hotel */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the hotel */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the hotel (1-5) */,
  "distance_to_airport" REAL /* Distance to the airport */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities provided by the hotel */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Check-in time */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Check-out time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hotel_partners_airport_code FOREIGN KEY ("airport_code") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)
